description: Lands Awakened Patch 8 (25 April 2022) — Season Winner Statue, Improved Arena Matchmaking, Other Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Other Changes

items.text: When catching rare fish, there is now a chance to obtain seaweed as an additional bonus drop

The connection between the dungeon "Cathedral of Light" (in Darkbough Snag) and Sunfang Wasteland was removed as it created a massive shortcut between these two zones. Players within these zones when the patch goes live will be moved to the nearest exit.
Bleed duration of Merciless Suppressor's Caltrops: 25s → 2s

stats.name: Bleed duration of Merciless Suppressor's Caltrops

items.text: Vengeful Guardian Lord (Territory Boss) and its summons no longer reset completely when a player leaves their pursuit range
Added new guild logo “Hood and Scythe”
[CONTROLLER] World Map, Local Map, and Destiny Board can be navigated via a centered cursor when not using the virtual cursor

sections.searchable_text: Other Changes When catching rare fish, there is now a chance to obtain seaweed as an additional bonus drop The connection between the dungeon "Cathedral of Light" (in Darkbough Snag) and Sunfang Wasteland was removed as it created a massive shortcut between these two zones. Players within these zones when the patch goes live will be moved to the nearest exit. Bleed duration of Merciless Suppressor's Caltrops: 25s → 2s Vengeful Guardian Lord (Territory Boss) and its summons no longer reset completely when a player leaves their pursuit range Added new guild logo “Hood and Scythe” [CONTROLLER] World Map, Local Map, and Destiny Board can be navigated via a centered cursor when not using the virtual cursor

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Axes
subsections.searchable_text: Axes Halberd Resilience Penetration: 30% → 50% Carrioncaller Resilience Penetration: 30% → 50%

subsections.heading: Daggers

subitems.text: Now applies an instant 100 damage each hit

subsections.searchable_text: Daggers Blood Ritual (Demonfang) Now applies an instant 100 damage each hit DoT damage: 50 → 25 Number of DoT Ticks: 3 → 2 Enemy Bleed Duration remains unchanged

subsections.heading: Swords

subitems.text: Reworked hit detection so that the ability only deals damage if it lands in close proximity to the target
When hitting at least one enemy, the player now gets an additional buff which increases Attack Speed by 50% and Attack Damage by 50% for 5s
Removed the additional percentage damage vs players

subsections.searchable_text: Swords Weakening (Passive, all Swords) Max Stacks: 1 → 5 Damage Reduction per stack: 4% → 2% Removed the Healing Reduction Effect Mighty Blow (Broadsword) Reworked hit detection so that the ability only deals damage if it lands in close proximity to the target Spinning Blades (Dual Swords) When hitting at least one enemy, the player now gets an additional buff which increases Attack Speed by 50% and Attack Damage by 50% for 5s Removed the additional percentage damage vs players

subsections.heading: War Gloves

items.text: Cross Step (all War Gloves) has been reworked and is now called Fleet Footwork

subitems.text: Kick enemies in a cone in front of you, dealing 50 physical damage
If the kick hits an enemy the ability can be reactivated for 2s to use Cross Step
Cross Step dodges behind the enemy
During the dodge animation all damage received is reduced by 40%

items.text: Removed Roundhouse Kick (The ability now starts with Dive Kick)

subitems.text: Now also purges enemies before the hit

subsections.searchable_text: War Gloves Cross Step (all War Gloves) has been reworked and is now called Fleet Footwork Kick enemies in a cone in front of you, dealing 50 physical damage Cross Step dodges behind the enemy Shock Wave (all War Gloves) Range: 11m → 13m Removed Roundhouse Kick (The ability now starts with Dive Kick) Dive Kick Time knocked airborne: 0.86s → 1s Cooldown: 20s → 15s Purifying Punch Now also purges enemies before the hit

subsections.heading: Bows
subsections.searchable_text: Bows Enchanted Quiver (regular Bows) Attack Damage Increase per Stack: 30% -> 25% Attack Speed Increase per Stack: 13% -> 10% Attack Buff Duration: 3.5s -> 5s

subsections.heading: Frost Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Frost Staffs Ice Shard (all Frost Staffs) Damage vs players: 125 -> 118 Freezing Wind (one-handed Frost Staff) Cooldown: 15s -> 18s

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Holy Explosion (Great Holy Staff) Enemy Knockback speed: 10m/s -> 20m/s

subsections.heading: Nature Staffs

subitems.text: Now directly Heals the target for 40
This effect can no longer be stacked by multiple players on the same target

subsections.searchable_text: Nature Staffs Protection of Nature (all Nature Staffs) Duration: 8s -> 6s Now directly Heals the target for 40 Healing Increased: 40% -> 35% This effect can no longer be stacked by multiple players on the same target Cleanse Heal (all Nature Staffs) Cooldown: 18s -> 20s Heal Values

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Avalonian Beam (Cowl of Purity) Cooldown: 45s -> 30s Purifying Smoke (Helmet of Valor) Hit Delay: 0.7s -> 0.5s Cast Range: 9m -> 11m

subsections.heading: Shoes

subitems.text: Now increases Damage instead of Bonus vs Mobs / Players

subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Mark of Sacrifice (Hellion Shoes) Now increases Damage instead of Bonus vs Mobs / Players Elbow Smash (Judicator Boots) Cooldown: 30s -> 25s

subsections.heading: 5v5 Crystal League
subsections.searchable_text: 5v5 Crystal League Points Reduction per Kill: 4 -> 6

sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Axes Halberd Carrioncaller Daggers Blood Ritual (Demonfang) Spears Glaive Swords Weakening (Passive, all Swords) Mighty Blow (Broadsword) Spinning Blades (Dual Swords) War Gloves Cross Step (all War Gloves) has been reworked and is now called Fleet Footwork Shock Wave (all War Gloves) Removed Roundhouse Kick (The ability now starts with Dive Kick) Dive Kick Purifying Punch Bows Enchanted Quiver (regular Bows) Frost Staffs Ice Shard (all Frost Staffs) Freezing Wind (one-handed Frost Staff) Hammers Tackle (Great Hammer) Holy Staffs Holy Explosion (Great Holy Staff) Maces Battle Howl (Heavy Mace) Nature Staffs Protection of Nature (all Nature Staffs) Cleanse Heal (all Nature Staffs) Helmets Avalonian Beam (Cowl of Purity) Purifying Smoke (Helmet of Valor) Shoes Mark of Sacrifice (Hellion Shoes) Elbow Smash (Judicator Boots) 5v5 Crystal League Points Reduction per Kill: 4 -> 6

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: Player crowd control resistances now correctly decrease knockback distance inflicted by various mobs, which previously had very high knockback distances
Clearer error message when trying to reroll too many items
Fixed an issue where the button to buy/upgrade your personal island could sometimes be disabled even when requirements were met
Fixed an issue where spells with no cast time could interrupt the movement of the caster
[CONTROLLER] Spell selection UI now opens when attempting to cast from an empty spell slot in Left Stick targeting mode
[CONTROLLER] Fixed an issue where Dynamic Action indicators could remain even after disabling Dynamic Actions in the options
Various additional graphical, UI, spell tooltip, and localization fixes
